caption: The video captures a man performing live music in front of an audience. He is wearing a white shirt with intricate embroidery and a black vest, and he has sunglasses perched on his head. The man is playing an acoustic guitar and singing into a microphone, which is positioned close to his mouth. The audience, visible in the foreground, appears engaged, with some members looking attentively towards the performer. The setting seems to be indoors, with wooden blinds covering the windows in the background, creating a warm and intimate atmosphere. The logo "ORCA" is displayed in the bottom right corner of the screen, suggesting that the performance might be part of a specific event or series.
